long_description:
When running INC10486381, it was found that the metadata agent on dal1-qz1-sr5-rk025-s35 in mzone716 was having a problem with the vault agent due to the "SecretSet client_cert LoadCertificate failed","error":"empty PEM block","AUDIT":true}" error.

What we will try to do is restart the vault agent and then restart the metadata agent.
Incident source: INC10486381 - Paul DiCarlo
short_description: RMDS-2210:  Resolve error with "empty PEM block" for metadata agent on dal1-qz1-sr5-rk025-s35 in mzone716
close_notes:
INC Resolution

All Timestamps must be in UTC)
### Brief Summary of the issue: 
Impacted Env(s): 
IPOps SME Escalated: 
Reason of escalation to Service Team:
Cause Code: is-vpc Node issue Memory issue
Runbooks used to resolve: Not Needed 
Error logs:
Timeline summary of actions done: 
Resolution steps: 
Performed the restarts of the service and shared the logs in the notes as requested.

Warroom (if any):
Webex (recording if any):
Customer Webex link (if any):
Caused by Change/Incident/Case/DevReq (if any):
Downstream Services impacted (if any):
Gaps IPOps faced(if any):
Business impact for customer(if any):
Jiras created (if any):
Emergency CR (if any):
current_status_next_steps:
From DPU dal1-qz1-sr5-rk025-s35:
1. sudo snap restart ibmcloud-vault
2. snap logs ibmcloud-vault
3. sudo snap restart ibmcloud-metadata
4. sudo diff -qs /var/snap/ibmcloud-vault/current/etc/metadata_cert.crt /run/mnt/data/system-data/var/snap/ibmcloud-metadata/common/conf/vetted-secrets//metadata_cert.crt 
5. snap logs ibmcloud-metadata
